title: Mega Camerupt Battle Guide
summary: A [fire]/[ground] trick-room nuke — [sheer-force] boosts [heat-wave] and [earth-power] by 30%, and Speed 20 is a blessing under trick-room.
weaknesses: Completely dependent on trick-room for speed control

recommendedMoves.reason: 150 BP spread [fire] nuke at full HP
Secures Mega turn and waits for trick-room

recommendedItems.reason: Mandatory Mega Stone with no alternative

bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Mega Camerupt is a trick-room special nuke. [sheer-force] boosts any attack with a secondary effect by 30%, so [heat-wave] and [earth-power] both get a substantial damage boost on top of 145 Special Attack. Speed 20 is low enough that under trick-room Mega Camerupt outpaces almost the entire metagame.

## Strengths
[sheer-force] pushes [earth-power] and [heat-wave] to effective ~130 BP after STAB and boost. [heat-wave] in particular is a spread move, so in doubles Mega Camerupt hits both opposing Pokemon at top damage tier. [fire]/[ground] gives hard coverage against Steel, Grass, Bug, Ice, and Fairy types.

## Weaknesses & Answers
4x Water is a death sentence — any hydro-pump or surf ends the set. [ground] and Rock weaknesses also shut down careless switches. Without trick-room up, Speed 20 loses to everything, so the team must commit to the strategy.

## Recommended Moveset
[heat-wave] is the bread-and-butter spread option. [earth-power] is the single-target [ground] nuke. [eruption] at full HP is the strongest [fire] spread move in the game but loses [sheer-force]. [protect] is essential for partner trick-room setup and Mega turn safety.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[cameruptite] is mandatory. [sheer-force] activates after Mega Evolution. Tera [fire] maximizes [heat-wave] damage, while Tera [ground] neutralizes the Water 4x weakness for a defensive reroute at the cost of STAB on [heat-wave].

## Teammates & Synergy
Requires a trick-room setter — dusknoir, hatterene, porygon2. Cover the Water weakness with a Grass or Dragon partner. fake-out and follow-me support keeps Mega Camerupt alive long enough to get off trick-room nukes.

## Play Patterns
Switch in after trick-room is up, [protect] if the Mega turn is risky, then start firing [heat-wave]. Use [eruption] only when at full HP. Save Tera for when a Water move is obviously coming and the alternative is losing the game.
